html:
Exclusive to:

ItemBuff StartBuff Ends

“Can be added to Crock Pot food using a Portable Seasoning Station.

Eating a dish spiced with Garlic reduces the damage they take to their health by 33%.

Duration 4 minutes.”

-

Garlic Powder is an Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It can only be crafted by Warly in the Seasonings Filter using three Garlics at the Portable Grinding Mill.

Garlic Powder can be added to Crock Pot dishes in a Portable Seasoning Station. Seasoned dishes gain the adjective Garlic before their names. After eating a seasoned dish, the player gets a flat 33% Damage Reduction, reducing all types of damage to health for half a day, or 4 minutes.

Eating multiple dishes seasoned with Garlic Powder does not stack the effect, but resets the cooldown period.

Example

Tips

  • The damage reduction makes Garlic Powder a useful seasoning for tanking Boss Monsters.
    • Note that it does not reduce the durability loss of armor.
  • This seasoning can be applied to health-restoring foods to make them doubly useful for combat situations.
    • Otherwise, Seasoning Salt is generally more effective if Garlic Powder's damage reduction is in effect.

Gallery

  • Overlay for dishes seasoned with Garlic Powder.
  • Overlay for dishes seasoned with Garlic Powder in inventory.
  • Dishes seasoned with Garlic Powder appear with a plate on the ground.
DSTDSRoGSWHam
plainText:
Exclusive to:
Garlic Powder
"The best offense is defensive halitosis."
Object Info
Perk
Provide 33% Damage Reduction when combined with a Crock Pot dish.
40
Crafting
×3
Amount produced
2
Filters
Tier
Miscellaneous
"spice_garlic"
ItemBuff StartBuff Ends
“A powerfully potent powder.”
–Wilson
“Powdered stink.”
–Willow
“Smells like mama used to make.”
–Wolfgang
“It's smell is good for keeping people at a distance.”
–Wendy
“TINY BITS OF DUST TO PUT ON ENERGY PACKETS”
–WX-78
“My goodness that smell is pungent!”
–Wickerbottom
“I suppose some spice couldn't hurt.”
–Woodie
“Keeps everyone from getting too close.”
–Maxwell
“Its pungent smell öffends mine nöstrils.”
–Wigfrid
“Our breath will smell stinky. Yay!”
–Webber
“Without garlic powder, life is not worth living.”
–Warly
“(sniff) ahh-CHOO!”
–Wormwood
“Hooboy. That's some smelly dust.”
–Winona
“Hissss!”
–Wortox
“Mmmm make breath smell nice.”
–Wurt
“It's good for you!”
–Walter
“Oh, that smell takes me back.”
–Wanda
“I feel much safer now!”
–Wilson
“Come at me, jerks!”
–Willow
“Ha! Wimpy blows bounce right off Wolfgang!”
–Wolfgang
“My pain has been dulled, for the moment.”
–Wendy
“DURABILITY INCREASED”
–WX-78
“I daresay I'm tougher than I may appear!”
–Wickerbottom
“I'm feelin' a heckuva lot tougher now!”
–Woodie
“I feel protected by an unseen force.”
–Maxwell
“Ha! No attack frightens me!”
–Wigfrid
“We feel so much safer now!”
–Webber
“I feel très formidable!”
–Warly
“Hmm, bark feel thicker!”
–Wormwood
“I'm tough as nails!”
–Winona
“I feel just great! Must've been something I ate!”
–Wortox
“Me tougher than you!”
–Wurt
“I'm invincible!”
–Walter
“I feel a bit safer, strangely.”
–Wanda
“Well, that was nice while it lasted.”
–Wilson
“Might not be the best time to pick a fight.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang will need new defensive strategy.”
–Wolfgang
“Ah. It couldn't last.”
–Wendy
“DURABILITY DOWN”
–WX-78
“It appears my defense has weakened.”
–Wickerbottom
“Anyone got a spare hockey helmet?”
–Woodie
“I've been left vulnerable!”
–Maxwell
“I've lost my defensive advantage!”
–Wigfrid
“Aah! We need armor!”
–Webber
“Ah... I've gone from tough to tender.”
–Warly
“Back to normal”
–Wormwood
“I'd better take a step back.”
–Winona
“That was fun, let's do it again!”
–Wortox
“G-glorp, don't hit!”
–Wurt
“Back to regular Walter.”
–Walter
“I'm suddenly feeling a bit unprotected...”
–Wanda
“Can be added to Crock Pot food using a Portable Seasoning Station.
Eating a dish spiced with Garlic reduces the damage they take to their health by 33%.
Duration 4 minutes.”
-
Garlic Powder is an Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It can only be crafted by Warly in the Seasonings Filter using three Garlics at the Portable Grinding Mill.
Garlic Powder can be added to Crock Pot dishes in a Portable Seasoning Station. Seasoned dishes gain the adjective Garlic before their names. After eating a seasoned dish, the player gets a flat 33% Damage Reduction, reducing all types of damage to health for half a day, or 4 minutes.
Eating multiple dishes seasoned with Garlic Powder does not stack the effect, but resets the cooldown period.
Example[edit | edit source]
Tips[edit | edit source]
The damage reduction makes Garlic Powder a useful seasoning for tanking Boss Monsters.
Note that it does not reduce the durability loss of armor.
This seasoning can be applied to health-restoring foods to make them doubly useful for combat situations.
Otherwise, Seasoning Salt is generally more effective if Garlic Powder's damage reduction is in effect.
Gallery[edit | edit source]
Overlay for dishes seasoned with Garlic Powder.
Overlay for dishes seasoned with Garlic Powder in inventory.
Dishes seasoned with Garlic Powder appear with a plate on the ground.
